title_es: Secretos del Salmón: Maximiza los Omega-3
hook_en: Want juicy salmon with max omega-3s?
key_message: Cooking wild-caught salmon skin-side down first locks in omega-3 oils.
visual_elements: Close-up of wild-caught salmon fillet on cutting board
Sizzling salmon on pan, skin-side down
Her smiling and pointing to the skin crisping up
Bite-sized salmon piece being lifted with a fork
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Salmon — Wild-caught salmon has 3x more omega-3s than farmed, with fewer contaminants (Tip: Cook skin-side down first — the skin locks in omega-3 oils)

title_en: Farmed vs. Wild Salmon: Which is Healthier?
title_es: Salmón de Granja vs. Salvaje: ¿Cuál es Más Saludable?
hook_en: Think all salmon is the same? Think again!
hook_es: ¿Crees que todo el salmón es igual? ¡Piensa de nuevo!
key_message: Wild-caught salmon has 3x more omega-3s and fewer contaminants than farmed salmon.
visual_elements: Side-by-side comparison of farmed and wild-caught salmon fillets
Zoom in on omega-3 content infographic
Overlay of contaminants warning on farmed salmon
Her showing thumbs up to the wild-caught salmon
_source_food_context: • INGREDIENT: Salmon — Wild-caught salmon has 3x more omega-3s than farmed, with fewer contaminants (Tip: Cook skin-side down first — the skin locks in omega-3 oils)
